visual_description: A close-up, profile shot shows a person with short, dark hair intently examining a small glass jar. The person holds the jar in their hands, looking down into it. The background is a brightly lit, out-of-focus white space. The audio opens with a soft, slightly melancholic instrumental piece, creating a pensive and somewhat somber atmosphere. The person then brings a white bottle with a red cap into the frame and begins to pour a clear liquid from it into the glass jar. The camera remains in a tight close-up, focusing on the action of pouring. A man speaks in a calm, conversational tone, saying, "Ooh, Jim." His voice is low and steady, suggesting he is observing something with quiet interest. The scene cuts to a wider shot of a medical examination room. Three men are present. In the center, a man in a dark suit and tie stands over a medical table where a body lies. To the left, another man in a white shirt and tie sits at a desk, looking on. On the right, a third man, seen from the back, wears a light-colored t-shirt and jeans. He is adjusting something on the medical table near the body. The room has light-colored walls and a cabinet with drawers
